_about: R14-seed base — fully local in-process YAAH deployment. The smallest viable root: one process, in-memory state, console trace, file-system prompts. Pair with `_extends: 'path/to/local.base.json'` in your own root, then add `providers`, `default_provider`, `pipeline`, and `input`. Pick this base for: dev iteration, fixture-driven runs, CI smoke tests, the QUICK START scaffold.
